subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! God willing, through the loving-kindness of the Lord of Names, mayest thou remain confident and joyous. Some time ago thy letter was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رضا انشاء الله بعنایت مالک اسما مطمئن و مسرور باشی چندی قبل مکتوبت لدی
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @justice and wrath of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
